requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions for Lighting Equipment (NS/IEC CISPR 15) under ASN / Conformity Route
requirement_topic.zh: 照明设备 EMC 发射（NS/IEC CISPR 15）依据 ASN／符合性路径
requirement_topic.zht: 照明設備 EMC 發射（NS/IEC CISPR 15）依據 ASN／符合性路徑

summary.en: Electromagnetic compatibility for lighting equipment in Senegal is benchmarked to the international CISPR 15 limits （radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment）, adopted by ASN as the NS/IEC CISPR 15 reference. Senegal does not enforce the EU EMC Directive; rather, where EMC is part of the regulated-import conformity check, it is assessed against the adopted CISPR 15-based standard through the Ministry of Trade conformity / PEC/VoC process. Conducted emissions （150 kHz–30 MHz） and radiated emissions （30 MHz–300 MHz） are the covered ranges. Where a luminaire incorporates wireless functionality, radio approval from ARTP （Autorite de Regulation des Telecommunications et des Postes） applies separately （see the smart/ecodesign lane）.
summary.zh: 塞内加尔照明设备的电磁兼容以国际 CISPR 15 限值（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性）为基准，由 ASN 作为 NS/IEC CISPR 15 标准采用。塞内加尔不执行欧盟 EMC 指令；当 EMC 属于受管制进口符合性检查的一部分时，通过贸易部符合性／PEC/VoC 流程对照所采用的基于 CISPR 15 的标准进行评估。涵盖范围为传导发射（150 kHz–30 MHz）及辐射发射（30 MHz–300 MHz）。若灯具集成无线功能，须另行取得 ARTP（电信和邮政监管局）无线电核准（见智能／ecodesign 项）。
summary.zht: 塞內加爾照明設備的電磁兼容以國際 CISPR 15 限值（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性）為基準，由 ASN 作為 NS/IEC CISPR 15 標準採用。塞內加爾不執行歐盟 EMC 指令；當 EMC 屬於受管制進口符合性檢查的一部分時，通過貿易部符合性／PEC/VoC 流程對照所採用的基於 CISPR 15 的標準進行評估。涵蓋範圍為傳導發射（150 kHz–30 MHz）及輻射發射（30 MHz–300 MHz）。若燈具集成無線功能，須另行取得 ARTP（電信和郵政監管局）無線電核准（見智能／ecodesign 項）。

standards_or_laws: NS/IEC CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (CISPR 15 as adopted by ASN)
Ministry of Trade conformity / PEC/VoC pathway (where EMC forms part of the regulated-import check — confirm scope)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743-2017 （Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment）, technically aligned with CISPR 15. For luminaires sold in China, GB 17743 compliance is required as part of CCC for relevant categories, with testing at CNAS/CMA-accredited laboratories. Chinese CCC EMC reports are not automatically accepted in Senegal's conformity verification, although both China and Senegal ultimately reference the same CISPR 15 emission limits.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743-2017（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。在中国销售的灯具须符合 GB 17743，这是相关类别 CCC 的组成部分，由 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室检测。中国 CCC EMC 报告不自动被塞内加尔符合性验证接受，尽管中国与塞内加尔最终均引用相同的 CISPR 15 发射限值。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743-2017（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。在中國銷售的燈具須符合 GB 17743，這是相關類別 CCC 的組成部分，由 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室檢測。中國 CCC EMC 報告不自動被塞內加爾符合性驗證接受，儘管中國與塞內加爾最終均引用相同的 CISPR 15 發射限值。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743-2017 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: Because both GB 17743 and the Senegalese NS reference derive from CISPR 15, emission limits are largely identical and the engineering burden is low. The gap is procedural: （1） Senegal verifies through the Ministry of Trade / PEC/VoC route, not via Chinese CCC, so EMC evidence must be presented to the Senegalese pathway; （2） test reports should come from an ILAC-recognised laboratory accepted in that process — Chinese CNAS labs are generally ILAC members, but confirm acceptance and report format; （3） EMC may or may not be a separately checked element depending on the product's regulated-import classification — confirm with ASN and the importer whether an EMC report is required; （4） wireless luminaires additionally require ARTP radio approval, which is separate from emissions conformity.
gap.zh: 由于 GB 17743 与塞内加尔 NS 标准均源自 CISPR 15，发射限值基本相同，工程负担低。差距在于程序：（1）塞内加尔通过贸易部／PEC/VoC 路径验证，而非中国 CCC，故 EMC 证据须按塞内加尔路径提交；（2）检测报告宜来自该流程接受的 ILAC 认可实验室——中国 CNAS 实验室通常为 ILAC 成员，但须确认其接受度及报告格式；（3）EMC 是否作为单独检查项取决于产品的受管制进口分类——请与 ASN 及进口商确认是否须 EMC 报告；（4）无线灯具还须取得 ARTP 无线电核准，与发射符合性相互独立。
gap.zht: 由於 GB 17743 與塞內加爾 NS 標準均源自 CISPR 15，發射限值基本相同，工程負擔低。差距在於程序：（1）塞內加爾通過貿易部／PEC/VoC 路徑驗證，而非中國 CCC，故 EMC 證據須按塞內加爾路徑提交；（2）檢測報告宜來自該流程接受的 ILAC 認可實驗室——中國 CNAS 實驗室通常為 ILAC 成員，但須確認其接受度及報告格式；（3）EMC 是否作為單獨檢查項取決於產品的受管制進口分類——請與 ASN 及進口商確認是否須 EMC 報告；（4）無線燈具還須取得 ARTP 無線電核准，與發射符合性相互獨立。

mandatory_status.target: Conformity-verification dependent — CISPR 15-based emission limits expected (NS/IEC CISPR 15); whether EMC is separately checked depends on regulated-import classification under Ministry of Trade / PEC/VoC (confirm scope)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743-2017 compliance required as part of CCC for luminaires sold in China

source.publisher: IEC / CISPR — base standard CISPR 15 as adopted by ASN (NS reference to be confirmed)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Lighting-equipment EMC emissions for Senegal are benchmarked to CISPR 15 as adopted by ASN （NS/IEC CISPR 15）, the same international base as China's GB 17743, so emission limits are largely harmonized. The difference is procedural: conformity for regulated imports is verified through the Ministry of Trade / PEC/VoC route rather than Chinese CCC, and reports should be from an ILAC-recognised laboratory. Confirm with ASN and the importer whether an EMC report is required for the specific product, and note that wireless luminaires need separate ARTP radio approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 塞内加尔照明设备 EMC 发射以 ASN 采用的 CISPR 15（NS/IEC CISPR 15）为基准，与中国 GB 17743 同一国际基础，故发射限值基本协调。差异在于程序：受管制进口的符合性通过贸易部／PEC/VoC 路径而非中国 CCC 验证，报告宜来自 ILAC 认可实验室。请与 ASN 及进口商确认特定产品是否须 EMC 报告，并注意无线灯具须另行取得 ARTP 无线电核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 塞內加爾照明設備 EMC 發射以 ASN 採用的 CISPR 15（NS/IEC CISPR 15）為基準，與中國 GB 17743 同一國際基礎，故發射限值基本協調。差異在於程序：受管制進口的符合性通過貿易部／PEC/VoC 路徑而非中國 CCC 驗證，報告宜來自 ILAC 認可實驗室。請與 ASN 及進口商確認特定產品是否須 EMC 報告，並注意無線燈具須另行取得 ARTP 無線電核准。

requirement_topic.en: EMC Immunity for Lighting Equipment (NS/IEC 61547) and ARTP Radio Approval for Smart Luminaires
requirement_topic.zh: 照明设备 EMC 抗扰度（NS/IEC 61547）及智能灯具 ARTP 无线电核准
requirement_topic.zht: 照明設備 EMC 抗擾度（NS/IEC 61547）及智能燈具 ARTP 無線電核准

summary.en: EMC immunity for general lighting equipment in Senegal is benchmarked to IEC 61547 （EMC immunity requirements for equipment for general lighting purposes）, adopted by ASN as the NS/IEC 61547 reference, covering ESD, fast transients/bursts, surge, conducted RF, magnetic field, and voltage dips. Senegal does not enforce the EU EMC Directive; immunity, where checked, is assessed against the adopted IEC standard through the Ministry of Trade conformity / PEC/VoC process. Separately, any luminaire with wireless functionality （Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee dimming, smart control） requires radio type approval / homologation from ARTP, the national telecom regulator, before import and sale — this is a distinct regulatory obligation from EMC immunity.
summary.zh: 塞内加尔通用照明设备的 EMC 抗扰度以 IEC 61547（一般照明设备 EMC 抗扰度要求）为基准，由 ASN 作为 NS/IEC 61547 标准采用，涵盖静电放电、快速瞬变／脉冲群、浪涌、传导射频、磁场及电压暂降。塞内加尔不执行欧盟 EMC 指令；抗扰度（如受检查）通过贸易部符合性／PEC/VoC 流程对照所采用的 IEC 标准评估。另外，任何具备无线功能（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee 调光、智能控制）的灯具在进口和销售前，须取得国家电信监管机构 ARTP 的无线电型号核准／认证——这是与 EMC 抗扰度不同的独立监管义务。
summary.zht: 塞內加爾通用照明設備的 EMC 抗擾度以 IEC 61547（一般照明設備 EMC 抗擾度要求）為基準，由 ASN 作為 NS/IEC 61547 標準採用，涵蓋靜電放電、快速瞬變／脈衝群、浪湧、傳導射頻、磁場及電壓暫降。塞內加爾不執行歐盟 EMC 指令；抗擾度（如受檢查）通過貿易部符合性／PEC/VoC 流程對照所採用的 IEC 標準評估。另外，任何具備無線功能（Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee 調光、智能控制）的燈具在進口和銷售前，須取得國家電信監管機構 ARTP 的無線電型號核准／認證——這是與 EMC 抗擾度不同的獨立監管義務。

standards_or_laws: NS/IEC 61547 — Equipment for general lighting purposes — EMC immunity requirements (IEC 61547 as adopted by ASN)
ARTP (Autorite de Regulation des Telecommunications et des Postes) — radio type approval / homologation for wireless-enabled luminaires

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 18595-2014 （General requirements for the electromagnetic immunity of lighting equipment）, technically equivalent to IEC 61547, but it is a recommended （GB/T） standard and less strictly enforced than China's emissions standard GB 17743. For wireless-enabled luminaires sold in China, SRRC （State Radio Regulation Commission） type approval is the domestic radio-approval requirement. Neither the Chinese immunity evidence nor SRRC approval is recognised by Senegal — ARTP approval is a separate national homologation.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 18595-2014（照明设备的电磁抗扰度要求），技术上等同于 IEC 61547，但为推荐性（GB/T）标准，执行力度弱于中国发射标准 GB 17743。对于在中国销售的无线灯具，SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准为国内无线电核准要求。中国抗扰度证据及 SRRC 核准均不被塞内加尔认可——ARTP 核准为独立的国家认证。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 18595-2014（照明設備的電磁抗擾度要求），技術上等同於 IEC 61547，但為推薦性（GB/T）標準，執行力度弱於中國發射標準 GB 17743。對於在中國銷售的無線燈具，SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准為國內無線電核准要求。中國抗擾度證據及 SRRC 核准均不被塞內加爾認可——ARTP 核准為獨立的國家認證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18595-2014 — General requirements for the electromagnetic immunity of lighting equipment (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard, IEC 61547 base)
SRRC type approval — China domestic radio approval for wireless-enabled luminaires

gap.en: Two distinct gaps. （1） EMC immunity: GB/T 18595 and the Senegalese NS reference share the IEC 61547 base, so the technical content is harmonized; the practical gap is procedural （evidence presented through the Ministry of Trade / PEC/VoC route, not Chinese CCC, and immunity may not be a separately enforced element — confirm scope）. （2） Radio approval: a smart/wireless luminaire requires ARTP homologation in Senegal, which is entirely separate from China's SRRC approval and from EMC — neither Chinese SRRC nor any EMC report substitutes for it. Manufacturers of smart luminaires must budget for a distinct ARTP submission （typically frequency-band, power, and test-report based） routed via the in-country importer, with French-language documentation. Confirm current ARTP requirements and accepted radio test reports for the specific RF technology used.
gap.zh: 存在两类差距。（1）EMC 抗扰度：GB/T 18595 与塞内加尔 NS 标准共享 IEC 61547 基础，技术内容协调；实务差距在于程序（证据通过贸易部／PEC/VoC 路径而非中国 CCC 提交，且抗扰度可能并非单独强制项——请确认范围）。（2）无线电核准：智能／无线灯具在塞内加尔须取得 ARTP 认证，与中国 SRRC 核准及 EMC 完全独立——中国 SRRC 及任何 EMC 报告均不可替代。智能灯具制造商须预留独立的 ARTP 提交（通常基于频段、功率及测试报告），经在地进口商办理并附法语文件。请确认所用 RF 技术的现行 ARTP 要求及受认可的无线电测试报告。
gap.zht: 存在兩類差距。（1）EMC 抗擾度：GB/T 18595 與塞內加爾 NS 標準共享 IEC 61547 基礎，技術內容協調；實務差距在於程序（證據通過貿易部／PEC/VoC 路徑而非中國 CCC 提交，且抗擾度可能並非單獨強制項——請確認範圍）。（2）無線電核准：智能／無線燈具在塞內加爾須取得 ARTP 認證，與中國 SRRC 核准及 EMC 完全獨立——中國 SRRC 及任何 EMC 報告均不可替代。智能燈具製造商須預留獨立的 ARTP 提交（通常基於頻段、功率及測試報告），經在地進口商辦理並附法語文件。請確認所用 RF 技術的現行 ARTP 要求及受認可的無線電測試報告。

mandatory_status.target: Mixed — EMC immunity (NS/IEC 61547) conformity-verification dependent under Ministry of Trade / PEC/VoC; ARTP radio approval mandatory for any wireless-enabled (smart) luminaire before import and sale
mandatory_status.cn: Immunity recommended (GB/T 18595, non-mandatory); SRRC type approval required domestically for wireless-enabled luminaires

source.publisher: ARTP (Autorite de Regulation des Telecommunications et des Postes, Senegal) — radio approval; IEC 61547 as adopted by ASN for immunity (references to be confirmed)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC immunity for Senegal is benchmarked to IEC 61547 as adopted by ASN （NS/IEC 61547）, sharing the same base as China's recommended GB/T 18595, so the technical burden is low; conformity for regulated imports is verified through the Ministry of Trade / PEC/VoC route rather than Chinese CCC. Critically, any wireless-enabled smart luminaire requires separate ARTP radio approval / homologation before import and sale — Chinese SRRC approval does not satisfy this. Confirm immunity scope with ASN and the current ARTP radio-approval requirements and accepted test reports with the importer for the specific RF technology.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 塞内加尔 EMC 抗扰度以 ASN 采用的 IEC 61547（NS/IEC 61547）为基准，与中国推荐性 GB/T 18595 同一基础，技术负担低；受管制进口的符合性通过贸易部／PEC/VoC 路径而非中国 CCC 验证。关键在于：任何无线智能灯具在进口和销售前须另行取得 ARTP 无线电核准／认证——中国 SRRC 核准不满足此项。请与 ASN 确认抗扰度范围，并就所用 RF 技术与进口商确认现行 ARTP 无线电核准要求及受认可测试报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 塞內加爾 EMC 抗擾度以 ASN 採用的 IEC 61547（NS/IEC 61547）為基準，與中國推薦性 GB/T 18595 同一基礎，技術負擔低；受管制進口的符合性通過貿易部／PEC/VoC 路徑而非中國 CCC 驗證。關鍵在於：任何無線智能燈具在進口和銷售前須另行取得 ARTP 無線電核准／認證——中國 SRRC 核准不滿足此項。請與 ASN 確認抗擾度範圍，並就所用 RF 技術與進口商確認現行 ARTP 無線電核准要求及受認可測試報告。
